data.name: Futa Training
data.detailed_description:
Futa Training: A Naughty Puzzle Adventure awaits you! Join John as he embarks on a journey of self-discovery and awakening. Uncover the secrets of the mysterious training facility where futas are waiting to guide him through a series of erotic challenges, including a unique match 3 puzzle game. Experience a thrilling blend of casual gameplay and visual novel elements that will keep you entertained while immersed in John's transformative adventure. Prepare for a world filled with vibrant characters and tantalizing scenarios that cater to your every fantasy. Embrace the power within and become the man you were meant to be!



Features:
  • Beautiful realistic 3D graphics
  • Polished match 3 gameplay
  • Juicy story
  • Sexy futa on male reward renders after each match

Gameplay:
Match 3 symbols of the same type to score points. Progress through story by playing matches of increasing difficulty and enjoy spicy rewards. The game features gallery with all the renders and can be played with one hand only.

Uncover the secrets of the mysterious training facility where futas are waiting to guide him through a series of erotic challenges. Featuring futa on male fantasy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:

  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
